titleStmt.title: SII 36.154: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 154. (A.R. No. 154 of 1910.) BŌḶUMĀMPAṬṬI (Ikkarai Bōḷuvāmpaṭṭi), COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete and damaged. The inscription is a copy of an old inscription. Seems to register gifts of land made by Rājarājadēva, for some services in the temple at Muṭṭam. Mentions the villages, Kōḷūr alias Arumoḻidēvach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, Irācarāca-nallūr, Iravivaṉmachchaturvēdimaṅgalam and Amarabhuyaṅgara-nallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī korājakesarivaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrarācentiratevaṟku yāṇṭu tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellā niṉṟa tirunaliyāṇṭu 2 10 7 vatu paḻaiya kalveṭṭiṉpaṭi perūrnāṭṭu muṭṭamāṉa Iraviva
Ulakuṭaiya perumāḷ Atirātarācatevar Ivaṟku ciṟukālaiccantikku nāṉāḻi Aricikku viṭṭa nilamāvatu kiṭanta koṭālikkavarukku vaṭakkil nilam Irukala nel vitaiyum Irācarācatevarāṉa Irācākkaḷ mātevar Itte
kiṭanta koṭālikkavarukku teṟkupāṟ kāṇiyaṉāl vitai tūṇippatakkum Iraṇṭāṅ kūṟṟil kāṇiyiṉāl vitai tūṇippatakkum koḷūrāṉa Arumoḻitevac caturveti maṅkalattu Ittevaṟku viṭṭa nel vitaika
ṉāḻikku Amaitta nel vitai maṉṟāṭi ventacūḷāmaṇip pallavaraiyaṉ kāliṟc cettamaiyil perumāḷ Ittevaṟku viṭṭanilam vaḻukaṉpaḷḷa vitai kalamum kollaṅkuṟai vāykkālukkuk kiḻakku nel vitai kalamum Āka
Amaitta Arici nāṉāḻikku nilam Irupūviḷaiyu nilam vaṭavayalāṉa Irācarāca nallūril viṭṭa nel vitai Irukalamum Iravivaṉmac caturvetimaṅkalattum Amara puyaṅkara nallūrilum mūlatevaṟku Uccic cantikku nāṉāḻi Ari
Digital edition of SII 36.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
